elements.original_description: A hardcover book with a colorful abstract design lies open on a white surface, its pages slightly curled. The lighting highlights the texture of the paper and the embossed title on the cover. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a hardcover book with a colorful abstract design, lying open on a pristine white surface. The pages are slightly curled. Cinematic lighting highlights the detailed texture of the paper and the subtle embossed title on the cover. Soft bokeh effect, sharp focus on the book. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks visible.

elements.original_description: A flat-screen monitor displays a paused video frame with a colorful thumbnail, surrounded by a simple black frame. The screen glows softly against the white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a flat-screen monitor displaying a paused video frame with a vibrant, colorful thumbnail. The monitor has a simple black frame. The screen emits a soft glow, contrasting against a clean white background. Cinematic lighting, sharp focus on the screen. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks are visible on the screen or in the scene.

elements.original_description: A hand holding a smartphone with a vibrant app interface open, showing a cartoon-style learning icon. The background is pure white, emphasizing the bright colors of the screen. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a hand holding a smartphone. The phone's screen displays a vibrant app interface featuring a prominent cartoon-style learning icon. Pure white background, emphasizing the bright, saturated colors of the on-screen icon. Soft, diffused lighting, sharp focus on the smartphone screen. No text, letters, numbers, or watermarks are visible on the screen or device.

elements.original_description: A laptop sits open on a white surface, its screen displaying a course enrollment page with a blurred-out interface. The keyboard and trackpad are sleek and modern, reflecting soft light. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: High-quality photograph of a sleek, modern laptop open on a clean white surface. The screen displays a course enrollment page, with the specific interface details artistically blurred to obscure text. The keyboard and trackpad have a polished finish, reflecting soft ambient light. Cinematic composition, sharp focus on the laptop. No legible text, letters, numbers, or watermarks are visible on the screen or device.
